START: ^You arrive at a remote mountain monastery. The path behind you has crumbled away.
gate_entrance: ^The gate opens into a long courtyard. A covered walkway runs along one side.
walkway_start: ^The walkway is cool and shaded. Doors open off it at intervals.
walkway_room_one: ^A small room with a single window. A rope hangs on the wall.
walkway_end: ^The walkway ends at a heavy door leading deeper into the monastery.
main_building_front: ^The main building facade is imposing. Steps lead up to double doors.
main_building_entrance: ^A grand entrance hall. Staircases lead up on both sides.
left_upper_hall: ^A long hall with portraits. Doors line the left side.
portrait_room: ^Portraits of former abbots hang here. One has a key around their neck.
portrait_study: ^The painting is signed with a cipher. You note it down.
left_hall_end: ^The hall ends at a locked door. Beyond it you can hear wind.
locked_hall_door: ^The door will not move. You need something to open it.
right_upper_hall: ^A narrower hall. A single door at the far end.
wardens_room: ^The warden's quarters. Sparse but personal. Someone lived here recently.
wardens_search: ^You find some matches but nothing else of use.
wardens_journal: ^The journal speaks of the monastery's history.
inner_courtyard: ^A smaller inner courtyard. A well sits at the centre.
inner_well: ^The well is deep. Something glints at the bottom.
well_bottom: ^At the bottom you find an old seal.
north_cloister: ^A covered cloister running around a garden.
cloister_walk: ^The cloister has carved stonework. Doors open into the building.
cloister_room_one: ^A meditation room. Cushions on the floor. Peaceful.
cloister_far_end: ^The cloister ends at a passage leading north.
cloister_garden: ^A well-tended garden. Herbs grow in neat rows.
garden_search: ^You find some useful herbs but nothing else.
north_passage: ^A long passage heading deeper into the monastery.
scriptorium_search: ^You find manuscripts but nothing useful for navigation.
archive_corridor: ^A narrow corridor leading to the archive. A door blocks the way.
archive_door: ^A heavy door. It opens with some effort.
archive_interior: ^The archive. Shelves of records stretching to the ceiling.
archive_search: ^You find historical records of the monastery.
upper_key_corridor: ^A corridor above the archive. A small room opens off it.
key_room: ^A small room. A hook on the wall where a key once hung.
chapter_house: ^The chapter house where monks once met.
refectory: ^The dining hall. Long tables still set.
kitchen_search: ^You find preserved food and some tools.
east_end: ^The passage ends at a staircase going down.
lower_level: ^The lower level of the monastery. Cool and dark.
lower_north_end: ^The northern end of the lower level. A heavy door leads to a tomb.
lower_south: ^The southern lower level. A smell of damp.
lower_south_corridor: ^A corridor with water on the floor. Getting deeper.
flooded_area: ^The floor is flooded. You can see a cellar door under the water.
drowned_cellar: ^The cellar is fully flooded. No way out.
tomb_entrance: ^A tomb. Stone sarcophagi line the walls.
tomb_deep: ^The deepest part of the tomb. A locked iron gate bars further progress.
locked_tomb: ^The gate is locked tight. You are trapped inside.
upper_chapel: ^A small chapel on the upper level. Stained glass and candles.
altar_examination: ^The altar has a hidden compartment. Empty now.
bell_tower: ^A bell tower with a view of the surrounding mountains.
tower_view: ^The view is extraordinary. You can see for miles.
monastery_library: ^A smaller library separate from the archive.
reading_alcove: ^A comfortable alcove with a padded bench.
infirmary: ^The monastery infirmary. Medical equipment from another era.
infirmary_exit: ^A door leading out of the infirmary.
central_corridor: ^The main corridor of the monastery running north to south.
north_end_corridor: ^The northern end of the main corridor. A door leads outside.
north_exterior: ^The northern exterior of the monastery. Cliffs drop away sharply.
south_end_corridor: ^The southern end. A passage leads to the guest quarters.
guest_room_search: ^Personal effects of a former guest. Nothing useful.
wine_cellar: ^The monastery wine cellar. Barrels line the walls.
wine_cellar_search: ^Most barrels are empty. One still has wine.
garden_shed: ^A tool shed at the edge of the garden.
dormitory: ^The monks' dormitory. Rows of small beds.
guardhouse_search: ^Old guard records and a cold hearth.
woodshed: ^A woodshed at the back of the monastery.
cistern_room: ^A room housing the monastery's water cistern.
cistern_examination: ^The cistern is still full of clean water.
monastery_exit: ^The far side of the monastery. A path leads down the mountain.
forgotten_vault: ^A vault hidden beneath the abbey floor.
sealed_annex: ^A sealed annex on the east side of the monastery.
outer_wall: ^The outer wall of the monastery. Weathered stone, centuries old.
outer_wall_east: ^The eastern stretch of the outer wall. A gate leads back inside.
bell_rope_room: ^A small room at the base of the bell tower. The rope mechanism hangs here.
bell_rope_examination: ^The rope is frayed but still functional.
scriptorium_annex: ^An annex off the scriptorium used for drying ink.
scriptorium_annex_search: ^Dried ink pots and blank vellum. Nothing useful.
lower_storage_east: ^An eastern storage room on the lower level.
lower_storage_west: ^A western storage room. Shelves of preserved goods.
lower_storage_west_search: ^You find some tools and preserved food.
cloister_east_door: ^A door off the cloister leading to a small antechamber.
cloister_antechamber: ^A bare antechamber with a stone bench.
north_tower_base: ^The base of a small north tower.
north_tower_top: ^The top of the north tower. A good vantage point.
north_tower_view: ^You can see the surrounding cliffs clearly from here.
monks_workshop: ^A workshop where monks made candles and soap.
pilgrim_shelter: ^A simple shelter near the main gate for pilgrims.
pilgrim_shelter_search: ^A bench and a cold firepit. Someone left a blanket.
roof_access: ^A hatch giving access to the monastery roof.
roof_walkway: ^A narrow walkway along the roofline. The wind is fierce.
roof_far_end: ^The far end of the roof walkway. A chimney stack rises beside you.
undercroft_entrance: ^Stairs leading to an undercroft beneath the main hall.
undercroft_far: ^The far end of the undercroft. A sealed door.
undercroft_door: ^The door is sealed with wax. Ancient.
east_tower: ^A small tower on the east side.
monks_cells_north: ^A row of small monks' cells on the north side.
monks_cell_north_search: ^Personal effects — a book and a wooden cross.
monks_cells_south: ^Another row of monks' cells on the south side.
prayer_hall: ^A secondary prayer hall used for daily offices.
lay_quarters: ^Quarters for lay workers attached to the monastery.
lay_quarters_search: ^Simpler than the monks' cells. Work clothes and tools.
cellar_entrance: ^Stairs down to the wine and food cellars.
north_gate_check: ^The gate is barred from inside. You could open it.
tack_room: ^A room for storing riding equipment, long unused.
burial_ground: ^A small burial ground behind the monastery.
ice_house: ^An old ice house for preserving food in summer.
ice_house_interior: ^Cold and empty. The insulation is still intact.
fish_pond_search: ^Cracked stone and dried mud. Long abandoned.
bake_house: ^The monastery bakehouse. A large cold oven dominates the room.
bake_house_search: ^Bread tins and flour bags, all empty.
laundry: ^A laundry room with large stone sinks.
laundry_search: ^Washing boards and cold water. Nothing useful.
scriptorium_gallery: ^A gallery above the scriptorium where finished works were displayed.
infirmary_ward: ^The main ward of the infirmary. Several beds.
porter_lodge: ^The porter's lodge beside the main gate.
porter_lodge_search: ^A log of visitors. The last entry is years old.
east_cloister: ^A secondary cloister on the east side.
east_cloister_walk: ^Quieter than the main cloister. Moss on the stones.
chapter_gallery_view: ^The chapter house looks smaller from above.
abbot_chapel: ^A private chapel for the abbot's use.
abbot_chapel_search: ^A simple altar and a kneeling cushion.
treasury_door: ^The treasury door is sealed. Ancient locks.
monastery_exit_path: ^The path down from the monastery begins here.
outer_gate_passage: ^A narrow passage through the outer gate wall.
lower_east_utility: ^A utility room on the lower east side.
lower_chapel: ^A small chapel in the lower level for the workers.
archive_reading_room: ^A reading room attached to the archive.
gatehouse_upper_search: ^A small sleeping room. A guard's quarters.
south_tower: ^A tower on the south side of the monastery.
passage_to_well: ^A short passage leading back towards the inner well.
records_room_search: ^Financial ledgers and property deeds. Very old.
west_exterior: ^The western exterior of the monastery. Quiet and sheltered.
west_exterior_search: ^Stone walls and a small lean-to shelter.
lower_passage_west: ^A western passage on the lower level.
south_exterior: ^The southern exterior. A path leads around the building.
monks_recreation_room: ^A room where monks spent their limited recreation time.
recreation_room_search: ^Board games and books of permitted reading.
east_exterior: ^The eastern exterior. The cliff drops away sharply here.
east_exterior_view: ^A long drop. You step back carefully.
old_mill_room: ^A room that once housed a small mill for grinding grain. The millstone is cracked but still in place.
barrier_approach: ^A path to the gatehouse barrier. You discover your rope has frayed and snapped.
gatehouse_barrier: ^A wooden barrier across the gatehouse exit. A rope mechanism controls it.
^Use your rope to work the mechanism
